script.hook_line: POV: you find out the food you eat EVERY DAY is causing your bloating

second_0_3.name: HOOK — The Result Reveal
second_0_3.action: Woman sitting at kitchen table, phone in one hand. She's looking at her F.A.S.T. results on her phone screen (we don't see the screen). Her expression shifts from casual reading to frozen — quiet shock. Eyes slightly wider, lips part 3-4mm. The 'wait... what?' moment
second_0_3.text_overlay: POV: you find out the food you eat EVERY DAY is causing your bloating
second_0_3.audio: Kitchen ambient. Quiet. Maybe a mug being set down
second_0_3.frame_a_expression: Casual reading face. Neutral-curious. Looking at phone screen (off camera, down-right)
second_0_3.frame_b_expression: Quiet shock. Eyes 15% wider, brow lifts (left more than right per asymmetry), lips part 3-4mm, jaw drops 2mm. Frozen. Second 0.3 of surprise. NOT theatrical
second_0_3.character_notes: No product in hand yet. Phone in one hand. Free hand was resting on table, now frozen mid-reach toward coffee mug

second_3_6.name: BODY — The Processing
second_3_6.action: She looks up from phone to camera. Direct address energy but still slightly off-axis. Processing face — not shocked anymore, now it's 'are you serious?' Mixed disbelief and slow realization. She might do a small head shake
second_3_6.text_overlay: the F.A.S.T. panel tests 88 foods across 4 immune pathways
second_3_6.audio: Quiet. Her exhale. Maybe chair creak
second_3_6.expression: Processing. Brow slightly furrowed, eyes narrowed (studying/thinking), mouth closed now. Head tilts slightly. 'Let me understand this' face

second_6_10.name: PROOF — The Product
second_6_10.action: Cut to: the test kit box on kitchen counter next to her coffee mug and phone. Natural context — this is her morning, the results just came in. The white box with navy INFINITE branding is clearly visible. Then she picks it up, holding it casually
second_6_10.text_overlay: catches delayed reactions other tests miss
second_6_10.product_notes: Box should look slightly lived-with. Maybe the corner is slightly worn from being on the counter for days. NOT pristine unboxing condition

second_10_13.name: RESULT — The Relief
second_10_13.action: Back to her face. Now she has a subtle, knowing smile. Not a big grin — a 'well at least now I know' expression. Slight eye crinkle. Relief energy. She's looking at camera more directly now (still 2 degrees off but more engaged)
second_10_13.text_overlay: results in 3-5 days + free dietitian consultation
second_10_13.expression: Quiet relief. Asymmetric half-smile (right side lifts more). Eyes softer, warmer. Shoulders dropped from tension. 'Finally, answers' energy

second_13_15.name: CTA
second_13_15.action: Product box back in frame, she taps it with her finger or gestures toward it. Text overlay does the heavy lifting here
second_13_15.text_overlay: Link in bio → covered by most insurance plans
second_13_15.notes: Keep her in frame with product. Don't cut to a separate branded end card — that breaks the UGC feel

shots_needed.description: Woman at kitchen table, reading phone, casual/neutral expression
shots_needed.notes: No product in frame. Phone implied (looking down-right). Free hand near coffee mug

shots_needed.description: Same scene, expression shifted to quiet shock
shots_needed.notes: Only expression changes. Everything else identical

shots_needed.description: Processing/thinking face, looking more toward camera
shots_needed.notes: Slight reframe — she's now addressing camera. Still kitchen. Different expression

shots_needed.description: Test kit box on counter with coffee mug, phone, morning context
shots_needed.notes: Product on surface, not in hand. Lifestyle context. NOT studio packshot

shots_needed.description: Her picking up / holding the test kit box
shots_needed.notes: Casual grip. Not display hold. Fingers wrap around short edge
Warmest expression. Half-smile. Eyes softer. 'Finally' energy

veo_animations.description: The hook moment: casual reading → frozen shock
